title: arum alpinum var. intermedium
intro: Arum alpinum var. intermedium, also known as the Alpine Arum or Cat's Tongue, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Arum family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Arum alpinum var. intermedium include its potential to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
